task: Review what evidence is captured during QA runs. Check for completeness and verifiability.

overall_assessment.verdict: PARTIAL - Evidence infrastructure exists but significant gaps in structured capture and verification

key_findings: Worker results lack explicit evidence fields - only narrative summary + git branch/files_changed
Commander bundle schema includes confidence/consensus but NOT evidence/source_refs fields
Collab ledgers (proposals.jsonl, consensus.jsonl) DO require evidence/source_refs but bundle omits them
No structured test/QA proof (tests_run, commands, stdout/stderr, exit_code, artifacts)
source_refs is required field in collab protocol (array of strings, no sub-schema)
Four inconsistent patterns: file-only, file:line, squad-IDs, runtime artifact paths
No git commit SHA tracking - cannot pin to exact code state
bundle.json files are always empty {} - source_refs never persisted despite requirement
Squad-ID references (sq-001-schema) break traceability chain to actual source code
Confidence is captured as metadata, not computed by documented algorithm
No scoring formula found - appears human/agent-assigned
Supporting evidence is narrative/trace refs only
Shadow/quality scoring (separate system) IS explicit and reproducible
Cannot independently verify confidence without defined algorithm
Comprehensive telemetry: swarm-state.json + child-agents.jsonl with cross-validation
100% valid ISO-8601 timestamps with microsecond precision
State counters match ledger event counts (cross-validated)
Smoke tests validate schema and required fields
GAPS: Heartbeat frequency undefined, counter reconciliation not automated, ledger integrity not verified
Bundle captures consensus.tier enum + freeform notes only
No vote counts, agreement ratios, or dissent tracking
No explicit rules mapping tier labels (CONSENSUS/MAJORITY/CONFLICT) to criteria
Monitor counts ledger entries but doesn't validate tier logic
Bundle schema omits required adoption fields (item_id, source_refs)

cross_cutting_issues.description: Evidence lives in collab ledgers (JSONL) but never propagates to bundle.json where it's needed for verification

cross_cutting_issues.issue: No git commit SHA in source_refs
cross_cutting_issues.description: Cannot pin evidence to exact code state at QA time - fundamental traceability gap
No algorithm = no reproducibility = no independent verification possible
Cross-file consistency checks discovered by QA, not automated in CI/smoke tests

immediate: Add evidence and source_refs fields to bundle.json schema
Require git commit SHA in all source_refs entries
Define heartbeat interval (5-10s) with staleness threshold (3x)
high_priority: Add automated counter reconciliation to smoke tests
Add ledger sequence numbers for integrity
nice_to_have: Add structured test artifacts field (commands, exit_codes, outputs)

summary: QA evidence infrastructure exists but has significant gaps. Telemetry is the strongest area (85% trustworthy) with cross-validated state/ledger files. Weakest areas: (1) bundle schema omits evidence/source_refs, (2) source_refs lack git SHAs and use inconsistent formats, (3) confidence scores have no verifiable algorithm, (4) consensus tiers have no documented criteria. Evidence lives in collab ledgers but never propagates to bundles. Recommend prioritizing bundle schema updates and commit SHA requirements.
